definition:
ύν-οιδα , pf. with Pres. meaning (see: οἶδα), 
 [in LXX: Lev.5:1 (יָדַע), Job.27:6; ptcp., 1Ma.4:21 A, 2Ma.4:41 A, 3Ma.2:8 R * ;] 
  1. to share the knowledge of, be privy to (Hdt., Thuc., al.): ptcp., Act.5:2. 
   2. C. prop. reflex., to be conscious of (Eur., Plat., al.), esp. of guilty consciousness: οὐδὲν γὰρ ἐμαυτῷ σ., for I know nothing against myself, 1Co.4:4.†
 (AS)
